title: Red Tooth
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Red|more=Tooth}}
'''''Red Tooth''''' was a group of two [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] under the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The corvettes were trying to destroy a [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] assembly with the help of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and another corvette group, ''[[Purple Claw]]'', which was witnessed by the [[Habassa]]. Both of the corvette groups and all of the Assault Gunboats were destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
